title: Project Structure
description: Explore the folders and files in a Flutter project.

slides.title: Key Folders 📁
slides.content:
# Anatomy of a Flutter Project

* **`android/`** – Android native code.
* **`ios/`** – iOS native code.
* **`lib/`** – Your Dart code (main app).
* **`test/`** – Unit and widget tests.
* **`pubspec.yaml`** – Project metadata and dependencies.

quizData.question: Where does your main Dart code live?
quizData.explanation: The `lib/` folder contains all your Dart source files.

slides.title: The pubspec.yaml file
slides.content: This file manages dependencies and assets. Example:
slides.codeSnippet:
name: my_first_app
description: A new Flutter project.

environment:
  sdk: ">=2.12.0 <3.0.0"

dependencies:
  flutter:
    sdk: flutter
  cupertino_icons: ^1.0.2

flutter:
  uses-material-design: true

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Keep `pubspec.yaml` indented correctly

YAML is sensitive to spaces. Use 2 spaces for indentation, not tabs.
